title: Proteomics of Saccharomyces cerevisiae Organelles.

content: S-EPMC2849710 PMC2849710 Proteomics of Saccharomyces cerevisiae Organelles. Knowledge of the subcellular localization of proteins is indispensable to understand their physiological roles.
